records.question: Which episodes from season 20 or later have a number in series of at least 422, a rating of exactly 7.0, and include the image containing https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BMjMyNzU4ODMzN15BMl5BanBnXkFtZTgwMTg5MTQ2MjE@._V1_UX224_CR0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
WHERE episode.number_in_series >= 422 AND episode.episode_image LIKE '%https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BMjMyNzU4ODMzN15BMl5BanBnXkFtZTgwMTg5MTQ2MjE@._V1_UX224_CR0%' AND episode.rating = 7.0 AND episode.season >= 20
records.pred_sql:
SELECT episode_id
FROM Episode
WHERE season >= 20
  AND number_in_series >= 422
  AND rating = 7.0
  AND episode_image LIKE '%https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BMjMyNzU4ODMzN15BMl5BanBnXkFtZTgwMTg5MTQ2MjE@._V1_UX224_CR0%'

records.question: Which episodes titled Lisa the Drama Queen have at least 429 in-series number, aired on or after January 25, 2009, are in season 20 or later, have exactly 1085 votes, and have episode number at least 9?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.number_in_series >= 429 AND episode.air_date >= '2009-01-25' AND episode.season >= 20 AND episode.votes = 1085 AND episode.episode >= 9 AND episode.title = 'Lisa the Drama Queen'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT episode_id
FROM Episode
WHERE title = 'Lisa the Drama Queen'
  AND number_in_series >= 429
  AND air_date >= '2009-01-25'
  AND season >= 20
  AND votes = 1085
  AND episode >= 9

records.question: Which episodes with at most 6 episodes and at least 955 votes feature credited animation checkers from California working in the Animation Department?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN person ON credit.person = person.name
WHERE credit.category = 'Animation Department' AND credit.credited = 'true' AND episode.episode <= 6 AND credit.role = 'animation checker' AND person.birth_region = 'California' AND episode.votes >= 955
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
JOIN Credit c ON e.episode_id = c.episode_id
JOIN Person p ON c.person = p.name
WHERE e.episode <= 6
  AND e.votes >= 955
  AND c.category = 'Animation Department'
  AND c.role = 'Animation Checker'
  AND p.birth_place LIKE '%California%'

records.question: Which episodes with a rating of 7.2 and number in series 433 won awards from the Primetime Emmy Awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN person ON award.person = person.name
WHERE episode.number_in_series = 433 AND award.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards' AND episode.rating = 7.2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Award ON Episode.episode_id = Award.episode_id
WHERE Episode.rating = 7.2
  AND Episode.number_in_series = 433
  AND Award.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards'
  AND Award.result = 'Won'

records.question: Which episodes that have awards with the award exactly 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)', that have keywords, and that have votes with at least 61 votes, and that aired on or after 2009-03-15?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE award.award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)' AND episode.air_date >= '2009-03-15' AND vote.votes >= 61
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Award ON Episode.episode_id = Award.episode_id
WHERE Award.award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Keyword WHERE Keyword.episode_id = Episode.episode_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Vote WHERE Vote.episode_id = Episode.episode_id AND Vote.votes >= 61)
  AND Episode.air_date >= '2009-03-15'

records.question: Which episodes feature awards won by people born in Hartford, USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN person ON award.person = person.name
WHERE person.birth_country = 'USA' AND person.birth_place = 'Hartford'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Award ON Episode.episode_id = Award.episode_id
JOIN Person ON Award.person = Person.name
WHERE Person.birth_place = 'Hartford' AND Person.birth_country = 'USA' AND Award.result = 'Won'

records.question: Which episodes aired on or before 2009-03-15 were recognized with a Primetime Emmy for Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour) at most in 2009 and involved a character designer from the Animation Department?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
WHERE episode.air_date <= '2009-03-15' AND award.award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)' AND credit.role = 'character designer' AND award.year <= 2009 AND award.award_category = 'Primetime Emmy' AND credit.category = 'Animation Department'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
JOIN Award a ON e.episode_id = a.episode_id
JOIN Credit c ON e.episode_id = c.episode_id
WHERE e.air_date <= '2009-03-15'
  AND a.organization = 'Primetime Emmy'
  AND a.award_category = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)'
  AND a.year <= 2009
  AND c.category = 'Animation Department'
  AND c.role = 'Character Designer'

records.question: Which episodes titled Four Great Women and a Manicure aired on or before 2009-05-10, are from season 20 or earlier with episode number at least 20, have exactly 927 votes, and feature a credited Mr. Burns role?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
WHERE episode.air_date <= '2009-05-10' AND episode.title = 'Four Great Women and a Manicure' AND credit.role = 'Mr. Burns' AND credit.credited = 'true' AND episode.season <= 20 AND episode.episode >= 20 AND episode.votes = 927
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Credit ON Episode.episode_id = Credit.episode_id
WHERE Episode.title = 'Four Great Women and a Manicure'
  AND Episode.air_date <= '2009-05-10'
  AND Episode.season <= 20
  AND Episode.episode >= 20
  AND Episode.votes = 927
  AND Credit.role = 'Mr. Burns'
  AND Credit.credited IS NOT NULL

records.question: Which episodes have associated awards and keywords and received votes with exactly 1.7 percent?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE vote.percent = 1.7
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Award ON Episode.episode_id = Award.episode_id
JOIN Keyword ON Episode.episode_id = Keyword.episode_id
JOIN Vote ON Episode.episode_id = Vote.episode_id
WHERE Vote.percent = 1.7
GROUP BY Episode.episode_id

records.question: Which episodes that have related awards from the year 2010 or later, have credits with the category exactly "Produced by", have related keywords, and have related votes, and have a number in the series at least 433?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE credit.category = 'Produced by' AND award.year >= 2010 AND episode.number_in_series >= 433
records.pred_sql:
SELECT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
WHERE e.number_in_series >= 433
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Award a
      WHERE a.episode_id = e.episode_id AND a.year >= 2010
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Credit c
      WHERE c.episode_id = e.episode_id AND c.category = 'Produced by'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Keyword k
      WHERE k.episode_id = e.episode_id
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Vote v
      WHERE v.episode_id = e.episode_id
  )

records.question: Which episodes numbered 17 or fewer feature someone whose birth name is exactly Marc Edward Wilmore?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN person ON award.person = person.name
WHERE episode.episode <= 17 AND person.birth_name = 'Marc Edward Wilmore'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Credit ON Episode.episode_id = Credit.episode_id
JOIN Person ON Credit.person = Person.name
WHERE Episode.number_in_series <= 17
  AND Person.birth_name = 'Marc Edward Wilmore'

WHERE award.award_category = 'Primetime Emmy' AND award.role = 'animation timer' AND episode.air_date >= '2009-03-15' AND episode.votes >= 1049
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Award ON Episode.episode_id = Award.episode_id
WHERE Episode.air_date >= '2009-03-15'
  AND Episode.votes >= 1049
  AND Award.organization = 'Primetime Emmy'
  AND Award.role = 'animation timer'
  AND Award.result = 'Won'

records.question: Which episodes with a rating of 6.5 and number in series at most 425 aired on or before 2008-11-09, have credited writing staff nominated for the WGA Award (TV) by the Writers Guild of America, USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN person ON credit.person = person.name
JOIN award ON person.name = award.person
WHERE award.organization = 'Writers Guild of America, USA' AND episode.air_date <= '2008-11-09' AND credit.category = 'Writing Credits' AND episode.rating = 6.5 AND award.award_category = 'WGA Award (TV)' AND credit.credited = 'true' AND award.result = 'Nominee' AND episode.number_in_series <= 425
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
JOIN Credit c ON e.episode_id = c.episode_id
JOIN Award a ON c.person = a.person AND e.episode_id = a.episode_id
WHERE e.rating = 6.5
  AND e.number_in_series <= 425
  AND e.air_date <= '2008-11-09'
  AND c.category = 'writing'
  AND c.credited = 'Y'
  AND a.organization = 'Writers Guild of America, USA'
  AND a.award = 'WGA Award (TV)'
  AND a.result = 'Nominated'

records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode

JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
WHERE award.role = 'animation timer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Award ON Episode.episode_id = Award.episode_id
JOIN Keyword ON Episode.episode_id = Keyword.episode_id
WHERE Award.role = 'animation timer'

records.question: What episodes that aired on or after 2009-03-22 feature people who have won awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN person ON credit.person = person.name
JOIN award ON person.name = award.person
WHERE episode.air_date >= '2009-03-22'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Credit ON Episode.episode_id = Credit.episode_id
JOIN Award ON Credit.person = Award.person
WHERE Episode.air_date >= '2009-03-22'
  AND Award.result = 'Won'

records.question: Which episodes numbered at most 430, with episode 10 and rating 6.9, include an image containing https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BMjI2MjcyNDYwNV5BMl5BanBnXkFtZTgwMDY5MTQ2MjE@._V1_UX224_CR0 and have nominees born in North Carolina for the WGA Award (TV)?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN person ON award.person = person.name
JOIN credit ON person.name = credit.person
WHERE episode.number_in_series <= 430 AND episode.episode_image LIKE '%https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BMjI2MjcyNDYwNV5BMl5BanBnXkFtZTgwMDY5MTQ2MjE@._V1_UX224_CR0%' AND person.birth_region = 'North Carolina' AND episode.episode = 10 AND episode.rating = 6.9 AND award.result = 'Nominee' AND award.award_category = 'WGA Award (TV)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Award ON Award.episode_id = Episode.episode_id
JOIN Person ON Award.person = Person.name
WHERE
  Episode.number_in_series <= 430
  AND Episode.episode = 10
  AND Episode.rating = 6.9
  AND Episode.episode_image LIKE '%https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BMjI2MjcyNDYwNV5BMl5BanBnXkFtZTgwMDY5MTQ2MjE@._V1_UX224_CR0%'
  AND Person.birth_region = 'North Carolina'
  AND Award.organization = 'WGA'
  AND Award.award LIKE '%WGA Award (TV)%'
  AND Award.result = 'Nominated'

records.question: Which episodes that have related awards, credits, keywords, and votes have an award with award_category exactly 'Primetime Emmy', an award year exactly 2009, an award role exactly 'co-executive producer', a keyword exactly 'anagram', a number_in_series at least 433, votes exactly 250, and a rating exactly 7.2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE award.award_category = 'Primetime Emmy' AND keyword.keyword = 'anagram' AND award.year = 2009 AND award.role = 'co-executive producer' AND episode.number_in_series >= 433 AND vote.votes = 250 AND episode.rating = 7.2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Award ON Award.episode_id = Episode.episode_id
JOIN Credit ON Credit.episode_id = Episode.episode_id
JOIN Keyword ON Keyword.episode_id = Episode.episode_id
JOIN Vote ON Vote.episode_id = Episode.episode_id
WHERE Award.award_category = 'Primetime Emmy'
  AND Award.year = 2009
  AND Award.role = 'co-executive producer'
  AND Keyword.keyword = 'anagram'
  AND Episode.number_in_series >= 433
  AND Vote.votes = 250
  AND Episode.rating = 7.2

records.question: Which episodes that have related award, credit, keyword, and vote records have a rating exactly 7.2 and include a credit with the role exactly 'character layout artist'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE credit.role = 'character layout artist' AND episode.rating = 7.2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
WHERE e.rating = 7.2
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Award a WHERE a.episode_id = e.episode_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Credit c WHERE c.episode_id = e.episode_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Keyword k WHERE k.episode_id = e.episode_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Vote v WHERE v.episode_id = e.episode_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Credit c2 WHERE c2.episode_id = e.episode_id AND c2.role = 'character layout artist')

records.question: Which episodes that have related awards from the Primetime Emmy Awards, related credits, and related keywords, aired on 2009-03-15 and belong to season at most 20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
WHERE episode.season <= 20 AND award.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards' AND episode.air_date = '2009-03-15'

SELECT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
WHERE air_date = '2009-03-15'
  AND season <= 20
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Award
      WHERE Award.episode_id = Episode.episode_id
        AND Award.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Credit
      WHERE Credit.episode_id = Episode.episode_id
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Keyword
      WHERE Keyword.episode_id = Episode.episode_id
  )

records.question: Which episodes titled Dangerous Curves have episode number 5, aired on or after 2008-11-09, are in season 20 or later with number in series at least 425, and have votes of at least 209 with a vote percent exactly 22.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE episode.episode = 5 AND episode.number_in_series >= 425 AND episode.season >= 20 AND vote.votes >= 209 AND episode.title = 'Dangerous Curves' AND episode.air_date >= '2008-11-09' AND vote.percent = 22.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Episode.episode_id
FROM Episode
JOIN Vote ON Episode.episode_id = Vote.episode_id
WHERE Episode.title = 'Dangerous Curves'
  AND Episode.episode = 5
  AND Episode.air_date >= '2008-11-09'
  AND Episode.season >= 20
  AND Episode.number_in_series >= 425
  AND Vote.votes >= 209
  AND Vote.percent = 22.0
